    Choose the right keyboard for you

    Our keyboards provide comfortable typing for your Surface Pro.1 Bundle and save with Surface Slim Pen on select keyboards.
    • Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard
    • Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard
    • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage
    • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard
    • Compare

    • Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard

      Transform Surface Pro into a powerful laptop in a click. Enjoy a full-size backlit keyboard and dedicated Copilot key for instant AI access.2

      • Color: Violet, Ocean, and Slate3
      • Bold keyset option available: Larger, bold font, high contrast, and brighter backlighting makes keys more visible for confident typing.4
      • Compatibility: Surface Pro, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch1

    Shop now Bundle your keyboard with Slim Pen

    • Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard

      Use this keyboard attached to your Surface Pro for the ultimate laptop set-up or detached as a standalone keyboard for added flexibility.5

      • Pen storage: Built-in storage and charging
      • Color: Black and Bright Sapphire3
      • Bold keyset option available: Bold keyset option available: Larger, bold font, high contrast, and brighter backlighting makes keys more visible for confident typing.4
      • Compatibility: Surface Pro 13", Surface Pro 9, and Surface Pro 8.1

    Shop now Bundle your keyboard with Slim Pen

    • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage

      Enjoy comfortable typing and a mechanical touchpad in a compact, portable design wrapped in the durable Alcantara® material.

      • Pen storage: Built-in storage and charging
      • Color: Black, Platinum, Dune, and Sapphire3
      • Bold keyset option available: Larger, bold font, high contrast, and brighter backlighting makes keys more visible for confident typing.4
      • Compatibility: Surface Pro 13", Surface Pro 9, and Surface Pro 8.1.6

    Shop now Bundle your keyboard with Slim Pen

    • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard

      Tackle any task with a keyboard featuring comfortable typing, a spacious touchpad, and a design that easily attaches to Surface Pro Wrapped in the smooth PU material.

      • Color: Black
      • Compatibility: Surface Pro 13", Surface Pro 9, and Surface Pro 8.1.6

    Shop now

    Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard
    Starting at $ • • • • • •

    • New soft-matte palm rest that's easy to wipe clean
    • Spacious precision touchpad for endless scrolling

    • Bold keyset option available: Optional bold keyset available in Slate only.4
    • Compatible with Surface Pro, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch1
    Shop now Bundle your keyboard with Slim Pen

    Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard
    Starting at $ • • • • • •

    • Use both attached and detached5
    • Larger, haptic touchpad
    • Built in Slim Pen storage and charging
    • Wrapped in durable Alcantara® material
    • Available in Black and Bright Sapphire3
    • Bold keyset option available: Optional bold keyset available in Slate only.4
    • Compatible with Surface Pro 13", Surface Pro 9, and Surface Pro 8.1
    Shop now Bundle your keyboard with Slim Pen

    Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage
    Starting at $ • • • • • •

    • Built in Slim Pen storage and charging
    • Large glass touchpad
    • Wrapped in durable Alcantara® material
    • Available in Black, Platinum, Dune, and Bright Sapphire3
    • Bold keyset option available: Larger, bold font, high contrast, and brighter backlighting makes keys more visible for confident typing.4
    • Compatible with Surface Pro 13", Surface Pro 9, and Surface Pro 8.1,6
    Shop now Bundle your keyboard with Slim Pen

    Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard
    Starting at $ • • • • • •

    • Premium typing and glass touchpad
    • Compatible with Surface Pro 13", Surface Pro 9, and Surface Pro 8.1,6
    Shop now

    Frequently Asked Questions

    |

    • With a Surface Pro Keyboard, you have the ability to type comfortably and work your way anywhere. The Pro Keyboards are sold separately to allow customers the flexibility to choose the keyboard that best suits their needs and preferences.

    • No, each keyboard is compatible only with its corresponding device size, 12-inch or 13-inch.

    • Our keyboards are designed with distinctive features that can fit your needs. Here are the feature differences:

      • Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard: This keyboard features a full-sized backlit keyset, a customizable precision touchpad with adaptive touch mode, and a dynamic hinge designed for easy attachment. It allows seamless posture transitions while remaining attached and ensures comfortable typing wherever you go. The palm rest is made of smooth matte material, while the back cover is crafted from Alcantara ®. It is available in three expressive colors and also offers an optional bold keyset with a larger font and brighter backlight for enhanced visibility.
      • Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard: Designed for flexibility, this keyboard can be used either attached or detached from the Surface Pro 13-inch, providing a more personalized workflow. It includes a large, customizable precision haptic touchpad with adaptive touch mode, a full-sized backlit keyset, pen storage always visable, and carbon fiber layers for added stability. With all-day battery life and made of Alcantara ® on both the front and back. Available in two expressive colors, it also offers an optional bold keyset with larger font and brighter backlight for improved visibility.
      • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage: This keyboard includes a full-sized backlit keyset, a mechanical touchpad, and integrated pen storage for convenience. Made of Alcantara ® on both the front and back. It is available in four expressive colors and features an optional bold keyset with larger font and brighter backlight for enhanced visibility.
      • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard: Featuring a full-sized backlit keyset and a mechanical touchpad, this keyboard is made of durable material. It is available in one color only.

      • This keyboard line is only compatible with Surface Pro 12-inch devices.
      • For more information, see compatibility details.

      • This keyboard line is only compatible with Surface Pro 13-inch devices.
      • For more information, see compatibility details.

    • To identify your device model, see Find out which Surface model you have.
    [1] Sold separately.
    • [2] Copilot key feature availability varies by market, see Key Support.
    • [3] Available colors may vary by market.
    • [4] Bold keyset option available only in US English.
    • [5] Detached use requires Windows 11.
    • [6] For a complete list of all compatible devices see Compatibility Details.
